channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-21
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates to both the scienceverse/metacheck and marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing projects. In scienceverse/metacheck, the integration of JAPS with jamovi on the `data_check` branch marks a significant step forward in streamlining journal article publishing. Meanwhile, the marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing project has seen improvements to its website and documentation, including a site build for version 0.4.1 and refinements to wording and formatting on the `master` branch. These updates demonstrate the connections between our projects, with metacheck's focus on data checking and tenzing's emphasis on user experience both contributing to a more robust research ecosystem. As our community continues to collaborate and build upon each other's work, we celebrate the progress made and look forward to the innovative developments that will emerge from these efforts.

28 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub9 commits
tenzing7 commits
metacheck6 commits
regcheck6 commits
